landing-page.description: PEDAL 소개 랜딩 페이지 (Dark Glassmorphism + 스크롤 애니메이션)

history.details: Completed Plan phase, moving to Engineering
Completed Engineering phase, moving to Do
Completed Do phase — Next.js 16 + GSAP + Lenis + Dark Glassmorphism. Build clean, tsc clean, ESLint clean.
Completed Analyze v0.1 — Weighted Match Rate 80.95%, 1 Critical (og-image), 8 Warnings. Decision: ITERATE REQUIRED.
Completed Iterate phase — all 8 gaps resolved. og-image, not-found, HERO_CONTENT, SiteContent type, design tokens, prettier, AnimatedSection removed from spec.
Completed Analyze v0.2 — Match Rate 87.3%, 0 Critical, 4 Warning, 8 Info. Decision: ITERATE REQUIRED (matchRate < 90%).
Completed Analyze v0.3 — Match Rate 91.3%, 0 Critical, 1 Warning, 9 Info. Decision: PASS. 크로스 리뷰 반영 후 최종 통과.
